text:
12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #0 7ad4fada6(HEAD)
$ which snort
/usr/local/bin/snort

$ snort --version

           Using libpcap version 1.9.0-PRE-GIT
           Using PCRE version 8.42 2018-03-20
           Using ZLIB version 1.2.11
           Using LZMA version 5.2.4

$ man snort
No manual entry for snort
$ man snort3
No manual entry for snort3

$ pwd
/usr/share/man
$ find . -type f | grep snort
